image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Did you know that more contagious diseases need higher immunity coverage?
Context visual: Herd immunity thresholds aren't one-size-fits-all. They vary based on the disease.
Escalation visual: For example, measles needs about 95% immunity to halt outbreaks. Why so high?
Evidence visual: More transmissible viruses like COVID-19 require similar thresholds. The data is clear.
Payoff visual: Understanding these thresholds helps us prepare and protect ourselves better.
Cta visual: Stay informed about vaccines and herd immunity. Follow for more insights.
